content.en:
Universal City.

Ye Tian returned here, and there was already an extra primeval gold leaf on his body.

For him, this piece of primeval gold leaf is too valuable, but he can't just take it out and sell or trade other primeval gold leaves.

Otherwise, he simply wouldn't be able to keep it.

First of all, he is now nameless, if some powerful Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor knew that he had the Ancient Gold Leaf in his hand, and only thought that he was a lucky Blood Transformation Realm, they would directly attack him.

He must build himself into an primordial-level genius of the top power, so that after his reputation is prominent, and then he takes out the primeval gold leaf, so that the forces will trade with him or consult each other, so that he will not dare to attack him.

He thought about it, and the fastest way to make a name for himself was to fight.

Of course, it was impossible for him to find many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors to fight for no reason, it would be too easy to offend many forces.

At this time, he thought of a place.

The Ancient God Realm!

Before, when he learned about the Ancient God Realm, he wanted to enter to play, but because he had to cultivate and break through the Heavenly Ancestor Realm of the Blood Transformation Realm four times, he didn't enter it.

Now, when it is time to make a name for yourself, the Ancient God Realm is undoubtedly the most suitable place.

In his opinion, the primeval divine realm was similar to a game, where each Heavenly Ancestor incorporated a fixed immeasurable will into it and condensed a body in the primeval divine realm.

Due to the rules of the Ancient God Realm, the physical strength of each Heavenly Ancestor in the Ancient God Realm is exactly the same, but because it is condensed by immeasurable will and contains its own imprint, any means can be used.

Yes, it is a simulation of the physical body of the outside world, but everyone's flesh and blood strength is the same.

In the primeval god realm, all Celestial Ancestors can participate in the Challenge, and the results of each challenge will be recorded, which will form the battle record of each Celestial Ancestor.

The better the record, the greater the fame.

Moreover, there are many honors.

For example, ten consecutive wins, 100 consecutive wins, 1,000 consecutive wins, 10,000 consecutive wins, and so on.

Not only that, but there is also income!

For example, in a challenge battle, if other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors want to watch the battle, they must pay to watch it, although the cost is not much, but if the number of Heavenly Ancestors watching the battle is large, it is also a lot of income.

For example, some Heavenly Ancestors have a great reputation, and if they don't look for resources and seek opportunities, they rely on the Ancient God Realm to earn Ancient Gold.

Of course.

The winner can only get half of the cost of watching the battle, and the other half belongs to the Ancient God Realm.

But even so, countless Heavenly Ancestors also want to win a game, so there will be income!

"If you want to enter the primeval god realm, you must buy a piece of the primeval divine decree from the primeval territorial waters!"

Ye Tian came directly to the Taigu Divine Realm Pavilion branch in Huanyu City, where the Taigu Divine Decree was sold, and the price was not cheap, a piece of the Ancient Divine Decree cost one hundred Ancient Gold.

If it was those Fusion Realm Heavenly Ancestors, they would definitely not be able to afford it, unless they had a background.

Therefore, almost all the Heavenly Ancestors in the Ancient God Realm were Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

Soon.

Ye Tian bought a piece of the Ancient Divine Decree and refined it.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's immeasurable will was integrated into the Ancient Divine Order, but it could only accommodate a small part, and it was impossible to continue to accommodate more immeasurable will.

No matter who it is, it can only accommodate so much immeasurable will, so it is fair.

......

The primeval realm.

Ye Tian's immeasurable will entered here, and a body was quickly condensed under the rules here.

"This body is very weak, only equivalent to the weakest Fusion Realm Heavenly Ancestor body!"

Ye Tian judged.

At first, he was a little unaccustomed to it, but he quickly got used to it and completely controlled the body.

At this time, he was in the personal space of the Ancient God Realm.

Subsequently, he signed up and filled in the information.

Airplanes!

A personal record box appears.

Account: Endless Heavenly Ancestor

Record: 0-0

Title: None

Balance: 0

The balance here can be exchanged for Taikoo Gold, and the 1000 balance income can be exchanged for a piece of Taikoo Gold, which can be exchanged for Taikoo Pavilion.

Of course, you can also top up in the Ancient God Realm Pavilion.

"Apply for the challenge!"

"Pending!"

"In line!"

At the same time, the Ancient God Realm sent him a message, that is, he was a newly registered Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and the first hundred battles did not cost anything, and he could participate in the challenge for free.

However, after 100 battles, you will have to pay to participate in the Festival.

Of course, the fee is not high, you only need to pay 100 points, which means that you need to pay the price of one piece of Swire Gold to participate in ten games.

If you want to reduce the entry fee, there are many ways, such as obtaining a title, and each additional title has a reduction, and if there are many titles, you don't even need any entry fee.

Soon.

Ye Tian's challenge application was successful.

"Teleporting to the challenge space!"

Airplanes!

Ye Tian was directly teleported away and entered the challenge space of the Ancient God Realm.

Since it was his first time participating, his opponent couldn't be very strong, it was estimated that he was a very ordinary Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and maybe even a Fusion Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

Of course, in the Ancient God Realm, everyone's physical strength was the same, so they couldn't see the cultivation of other Heavenly Ancestors.

Challenge the space.

Ye Tian and another Heavenly Ancestor appeared here.

Records can be hidden or made public.

At this time, Ye Tian's record is public, and the opponent's record is also public.

27 wins, 879 losses

As you can see from the record, this is a weak chicken!

At this time, this Heavenly Ancestor was also observing Ye Tian's achievements.

"Newcomer, maybe I can win!"

This Heavenly Ancestor thought to himself.

The challenge begins!

Rumble!

Ye Tian directly bombarded him with one punch, and only used the extreme technique.

However, the other party couldn't stop it at all.

Click!

Under one punch, the opponent's body was directly exploded.

One move is killed in seconds!

Somewhere in the boundary of the territorial waters.

A Heavenly Ancestor came out of the Ancient God Realm and frowned slightly.

"It's a little unlucky, this newcomer is so fierce, I was killed in one move!!!"

He once again fused a part of his immeasurable will into it, and entered the primeval god realm again.

......

"It's a victory, but it's a pity that there is no Heavenly Ancestor to watch the battle, and there is no income!" Ye Tian muttered.

This is normal, after all, he is not famous, and the other party also dares to be weak, who will watch this game!

However, as he continues to win, he will definitely encounter the popular Heavenly Ancestor, and the number of Heavenly Ancestors watching the battle will increase at that time.

When the time comes, as long as he wins, the income from watching the battle will belong to him.

"Continue to apply for the challenge!"

In the following days, Ye Tian applied for one challenge after another, but sometimes it took some time to apply successfully, after all, the Ancient God Realm had to arrange a suitable Heavenly Ancestor to fight against him, which would take time.
